# Call Kaids Roofing

> Owner-operated roof restorations, repairs, painting, repointing, gutter cleaning and leak detection across Southeast Melbourne. Based in Clyde North. ABN 39475055075. Phone 0435 900 709.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Roof restoration & repairs in SE Melbourne.
- [About](/about): Owner-operated roofing story and standards.
- [Services](/services): Full list of roofing services offered.
- [Contact](/contact): Phone, email and service area.
- [Book](/book): Book a free roof inspection.
- [Quote](/quote): Request a quote online.
- [Emergency](/emergency): 48-hour emergency leak response.
- [Warranty](/warranty): Workmanship warranty summary.
- [Blog](/blog): Roofing guides and case studies.

## Services

- [Roof Restoration](/services/roof-restoration): Multi-step restoration of tiled roofs.
- [Roof Painting](/services/roof-painting): Premium membrane roof painting.
- [Roof Repairs](/services/roof-repairs): Leak and storm damage repairs.
- [Roof Repointing](/services/roof-repointing): Flexible pointing for ridge caps.
- [Roof Cleaning](/services/roof-cleaning): Soft-wash moss and lichen removal.
- [Gutter Cleaning](/services/gutter-cleaning): Full gutter and downpipe clear-out.
- [Valley Iron Replacement](/services/valley-iron-replacement): Replace rusted valley irons.
- [Tile Replacement](/services/tile-replacement): Match and replace broken tiles.
- [Leak Detection](/services/leak-detection): Targeted leak diagnosis.
